tasks.label: Build + Upload + Monitor (USB)
args:
Write-Host 'Detecting COM port...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; .\detect_port.ps1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host '
Building firmware...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; pio run; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host '
Uploading firmware...' -ForegroundColor Green; pio run --target upload; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host '
Waiting for device reset...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Host 'Opening serial monitor...' -ForegroundColor Green; pio device monitor } else { Write-Host 'Upload failed!' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 } } else { Write-Host 'Build failed!' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 } } else { Write-Host 'Port detection failed!' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }

tasks.label: Monitor Only
args: Write-Host 'Detecting COM port...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; .\detect_port.ps1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Opening serial monitor...' -ForegroundColor Green; pio device monitor } else { Write-Host 'Port detection failed!' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }
